title: Privacy Policy
text: This Privacy Policy describes how ForecastAI (“this site”) collects and uses information.

title: Privacy Policy
text:
Information We Collect
This site may collect the following information.

Visitor statistics (anonymous data via Google Analytics)

title: Privacy Policy
text:
Google Analytics
This site uses Google Analytics to collect visitor statistics. Google Analytics uses cookies, and collected data is processed anonymously. You can review Google’s Privacy Policy here.

title: Privacy Policy
text:
Google AdSense
This site displays advertisements through Google AdSense. Google may use cookies to show ads based on your interests. To opt out of personalized advertising, visit Google Ad Settings.

title: Privacy Policy
text:
Cookies
This site uses cookies to enhance user experience. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, though some features may be limited.

title: Privacy Policy
text:
Third-Party Links
This site may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites.

title: Privacy Policy
text:
Changes to This Policy
This policy may be updated as needed. Any changes will be reflected on this page.

title: CH₄ Flux Prediction Using Transfer Entropy-based IMV-LSTM
text:
Transfer Entropy (TE) is a nonlinear causality measure based on information theory.
import numpy as np

def transfer_entropy(X, Y, k=1, bins=10):
    X_d = np.digitize(X, np.histogram_bin_edges(X, bins=bins))
    Y_d = np.digitize(Y, np.histogram_bin_edges(Y, bins=bins))
    # TE computation logic
    return te

title: CH₄ Flux Prediction Using Transfer Entropy-based IMV-LSTM
text:
Results

title: Categories
text:
CH₄ Flux Prediction Using Transfer Entropy-based IMV-LSTM



Causal Inference

Deep Learning

Time Series

Python



We introduce a TE-IMV-LSTM framework that integrates Transfer Entropy as a variable selection criterion into the IMV-LSTM architecture, validated on FLUXNET CH₄ data.





Apr 10, 2026


Prof. Shin (phyzik)

title: About
text: ForecastAI is a technical blog sharing core concepts, recent research, and hands-on tutorials in artificial intelligence and data science.

title: About
text: ForecastAI is a technical blog sharing core concepts, recent research, and hands-on tutorials in artificial intelligence and data science.

title: About
text:
Topics We Cover

Time Series Forecasting — LSTM, Transformer, and statistical model-based analysis and prediction
Causal Inference — Data-driven causal analysis using Transfer Entropy, Granger Causality, PCMCI, and more
Deep Learning & Machine Learning — Model architecture, training strategies, and hyperparameter tuning
Explainable AI (XAI) — Techniques for model interpretability and trustworthiness
Data Analysis — Exploratory data analysis, preprocessing, and visualization

title: About
text:
Our Goals

Explain papers and theory with executable code.
Provide practical, actionable content for students and practitioners in data science and AI.
Cover each topic in depth while keeping it concise and to the point.
